name: deliverables
description: Produce a branded, PDF-ready client deliverable in the format you ask for: a multi-page report, a single-page one-pager, a 16:9 slide deck, or a prose document/memo. Pulls content from an audit and its companion working docs (or from content you supply) and renders it with a shared branding system and component library across all four formats. Applies the default brand automatically and falls back to a neutral look. Output is one self-contained HTML file per deliverable, Cmd+P to PDF. Works alongside /audit:deep on any platform.
